scripts.build: npm --workspace @syngy/syntool run build && npm --workspace @mcplinx/remote-task-user-pages run build && npm --workspace @mcplinx/remote-task-management-pages run build && npm --workspace @mcplinx/remote-task-shared-connection-pages run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace @syngy/syntool run test && npm --workspace @mcplinx/remote-task-user-pages run test && npm --workspace @mcplinx/remote-task-management-pages run test && npm --workspace @mcplinx/remote-task-shared-connection-pages run test
